routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
|
| — 5 white of eggs boiled
| — 3 yolk of eggs boiled
| — 5g of olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 55g + water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 avocado 200g whole
-----------------------

14:00 — return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 20:30 — ☀️ Lunch (light, pre-football)
| — kefta 90/10 110g
| — khobz complet 35g
-----------------------

22:00 — ⚽ Football training (1h30)

-----------------------
| 23:30 — 🌙 Post-match Dinner
| — kefta 90/10 140g (remainder, deferred from lunch)
| — 300g legume sauté (carrot, courgette, onion)
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 2g Almonds
| — 2g Walnuts
| — 2g Cashews
| — 2g Pistachios
| — 1 kiwi
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep

adjustments.reason: Bread used twice in a day — protocol rule for gas. Khobz at lunch stays; breakfast bread goes.
Adds back the missing 77 kcal / 13g carbs from removing the bread — keeps macros balanced.

adjustments.from: Kefta 250g + 300g légumes sautés all at 20:30 lunch, 1h30 before football
adjustments.to: Kefta split 110g (pre-match lunch) / 140g (post-match dinner) — légumes 300g moved entirely to post-match
adjustments.reason: A full fatty (kefta) + fibrous (légumes) meal 1h30 before an intense football session risks cramping and gas mid-match. Lighter, faster-digesting lunch now; the rest becomes the post-match recovery meal.

verdict.text_html: Light for a training day — 1,730 kcal (−570 vs training target). Protein and fat on point, but carbs are short for a football session.

coverage.name: Calories
coverage.note: Same food as a rest day, but training target is 570 kcal higher

coverage.name: Protein
coverage.note: Unchanged — kefta, whey ×2, eggs still the backbone

coverage.name: Carbs
coverage.note: Well under the training target — no extra carb source added around the match

coverage.name: Fat
coverage.note: Unchanged — avocado, kefta, yolks, olive oil stack

coverage.name: Fiber
coverage.note: Oat increase compensates bread removal — fiber maintained

coverage.name: Gas / bloat risk
coverage.note: Lunch lightened before the match (fat + fiber deferred to post-match) — lower risk during play than eating it all at 20:30

coverage.name: Protocol adherence
coverage.note: Dinner pushed to 23:30 by the 22h match — breaks the dinner-by-22h rule, unavoidable with a night session; cumin ✓, single bread ✓

coverage.name: Vitamin A
coverage.note: Unchanged — carrot remains the dominant Vit A source

good: Lunch lightened before the match — kefta + légumes deferred to post-match, lower gas/cramp risk during play
Protein (94%) and fat (107%) still on target despite the day-type flip
Bread-twice violation resolved — cumin ✓, single bread ✓
Carrot Vit A, egg+kefta Selenium, yolk Choline standouts unchanged
bad: 570 kcal / 133g carbs short of the training target — no extra fuel added around the match, only re-timed
Dinner lands at 23:30 (post-match) — breaks the dinner-by-22h rule, though the 22h game leaves no earlier option
Omega-3 still minimal — no fatty fish day (structural gap)
Magnesium at 46% — supplement or add pumpkin seeds daily
loggedItems: Whole wheat bread — removed (bread used twice, gas risk)
300g légumes sautés (carrot 100g, courgette 100g, onion 100g) — moved to post-match

fullTable.note: Marginally lower without bread protein — kefta + whey unchanged
Bread removal (-2.1g) offset by oat increase (+2.1g) — net unchanged
Unchanged — walnuts 2g only (0.13g ALA), no fatty fish
Unchanged — structural gap without fatty fish
Oat 55g adds slightly more iron than 35g — minor improvement
Oat 55g adds 8mg more Mg — slightly better but still a gap
Unchanged — perly + whey are the main sources
Oat 55g adds 0.15mg more B1 vs 35g — modest improvement
Oat 55g adds 0.07mg more copper — slight improvement
Fromage frais mild — consider swapping for raib for better gut value
Slightly less — one bread removed, within normal range
Unchanged — whey + kefta + yolks well above target
Oat 55g adds extra 0.3mg Mn — meaningful improvement
Oat now the sole grain base — slightly more chromium from more oat
